real_insight: The deepest part of any production system is composite tacit knowledge — pattern-matched across hundreds of dashboard glances, three real incidents, two false alarms, and the specific feel of how this system breathes — and this is not a soft observation, it is the operational ceiling on documentation.
objection: If anything, the verse risks UNDER-claiming — the payments-platform p99-wobble example is exactly the kind of knowledge that does not show up in any document and does take ~3 years on the rotation to acquire. The falsifiability clause and the counter_example handle the obvious failure mode (using the verse to defend hoarding). This is the most engineering-real verse in the block.
